case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS DARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,029.76 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC. $1,029.76 PRINCIPAL, $36.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC.
